content.en:
Dao Ancient Realm.

The hundred peak half-step perfect controllers of the Daoless Pagoda came in one after another, standing in the void of the Dao Ancient Realm one by one, and immediately began to cultivate.

After all, this special period of the Dao Ancient Realm can only last for a thousand eternal years, and once this time is exceeded, the Dao Ancient Realm will return to the ordinary, and there will be no way to assist in cultivation.

"Let's get started!"

Ye Tian integrated his Endless Dao into the origin of the Dao Ancient Realm.

The next moment, in his perception, many changes in the Endless Dao appeared around him.

Airplanes!!!!

The Endless Dao changes are constantly increasing, and they are still under his control.

In this case, Ye Tian could completely continue to study the changes in the Endless Dao.

You must know that there is no change in the Endless Dao between heaven and earth in ordinary times, and if you want to study or comprehend the Endless Dao between heaven and earth, you can't do it at all.

But now, there is no difference between the changes in the Endless Path and the changes in the other Paths.

"A thousand eternal years, with my comprehension and the help of the Enlightenment Dao White Lotus and the Dao affinity, I should be able to comprehend the changes of the Endless Dao to three or three billion kinds!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

In the following years, Ye Tian continued to comprehend the changes of the Endless Dao and mastered more and more changes of the Endless Dao.

And the progress speed of the other peak half-step perfect controllers was also very fast, far beyond usual, but compared to Ye Tian, the gap was very large.

Now.

Some of the Perfection Masters of the Daoless Pagoda were also paying attention to the hundred peak half-step Perfect Controllers who had entered the Dao Ancient Realm.

Among them is the Lord of the Bloodshed.

"I wonder if this time the Dao Ancient Realm can let us give birth to one or two perfect controllers in the Dao Tower?"

The Lord of Blood Separation secretly looked forward to it.

As for the half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm, he didn't dare to ask for extravagance, after all, it was many times more difficult than becoming a perfect master.

Even he didn't become a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm at the beginning, but only became a perfect controller with a peak half-step perfect master.

According to the understanding of the Blood Separation Lord, this time, there are several peak half-step perfect controllers who are very close to mastering the perfect mark of their own Dao, and they are already very close to three or three billion changes, so after entering the Dao Ancient Realm, it is very likely that they will directly grasp the perfect mark of their own Dao.

And those who themselves have no hope of becoming half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Creation Realm, so they may give up on becoming half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Creation Realm, and directly choose to impact the perfect controller.

The more perfect controllers there are, the stronger the Daoless Tower will become.

Unconsciously, Ye Tian had already cultivated in the Dao Ancient Realm for nearly a thousand eternal years.

this day.

Ye Tian's Endless Dao had already mastered nearly three billion changes, and only a few changes remained.

As a result, he was about to master the Endless Dao Perfect Seal.

After a while, Ye Tian realized several changes, and only the last one remained.

At this time, Ye Tian was very excited.

Time passed little by little, and the last kind of endless Dao change was also realized by Ye Tianshen.

Rumble!!!!

The metamorphosis begins!

The three and three billion changes of the Endless Dao were completely sensed by Ye Tian, and they immediately continued to merge, turning into the Endless Dao Perfect Mark, and the Endless Dao also began to transform into the Perfect Dao.

The Endless Dao turned into a perfect Dao, forming a perfect mark, which was still not a small increase in Ye Tian's strength.

The most important thing is that Ye Tian can dominate the other perfect seals with the Endless Dao Perfect Seal, temporarily fusing them into one, and increasing his strength even more.

It can be said that Ye Tian's strength has improved a lot now.

Moreover, if he wanted to, he could step into the realm of the perfect controller with a single thought.

Of course, he didn't attack the Perfect Master, his current goal was to become a Half-Step Perfect Master of the Extreme Creation Realm.

After another period of time, Ye Tian comprehended several changes in the Endless Dao, and the time was completely up.

Airplanes!!!!

A pinnacle half-step perfect controller came out of the Dao Ancient Realm, and the Dao Ancient Realm was closed again, and it would take a long time before it would be opened.

The Endless Dao has become the Path of Perfection, the half-step Perfect Will and the Half-Step Perfect Control Body have all reached the Perfection Realm, reaching the current peak, and then Ye Tian can only continue to progress if he becomes the Half-Step Perfection Master of the Extreme Creation Realm.

And the difficulty of becoming a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm is still very great, and the Extreme Creation Material only lays the foundation, and it cannot help Ye Tian break through the shackles and become a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm.

In the days that followed, Ye Tian continued to collect information about the half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Creation Realm, and also exchanged experiences with some peak half-step perfect controllers.

According to his understanding, if the peak half-step perfect master wants to become a half-step perfect master of the Extreme Creation Realm, he not only needs a large amount of extreme creation materials, but also a large number of treasures that can improve the body of control, and use countless treasures to forcibly break the shackles, let the body of control transform, break the boundary of the body of perfection half-step perfect control, and achieve the body of half-step perfect control of the Extreme Realm.

Of course, no one can say exactly how many treasures will be needed to improve the body of control, but the more prepared the better.

Ye Tian felt that he had absorbed so many Extreme Creation Golden Liquid, Hundred Desolation Golden Fruits, and Divine Creation Golden Leaves, and the Extreme Creation Substances contained in his body did not know how much more than other Extreme Creation Realm half-step perfect controllers, so his potential was enough to be promoted to the Extreme Creation Realm half-step perfect controller.

Therefore, he probably only needed to collect enough treasures that could improve the body of control before he could attack the half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm.

Thereupon.

In the following years, Ye Tian continued to collect various resources to improve his control body, plus he himself could also take on many tasks of the Daoless Tower, in exchange for such resources.

The years passed, and hundreds of thousands of eternal years passed unconsciously.

During this period of time, Ye Tian created more top-notch perfect control techniques, condensed all the Dao he mastered into perfect marks, and improved all the aspects that could be improved to the extreme.

It can be said that he can barely enter.

At the same time, he also collected a huge amount of resources, just waiting to attack the half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm.

......

this day.

Ye Tian announced the retreat and began to impact the half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm, this is a new beginning, once he breaks through, the future is bright.

No road tower sub-tower.

In the void, Ye Tian took out a large amount of resources and spread them all around him.

Immediately, he began to absorb the resources around him, and the endless resources were absorbed by Ye Tian, and he immediately began to impact the shackles of the body under control.

Rumble!!!!

At the root of Ye Tian's control body, the chains of control here had all been broken, but now under the supply of extreme materials and a large amount of resources, a golden chain emerged.

"There you have appeared, Chain!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

The reason why the peak half-step perfect master needs enough pole-making substances is because without the pole-making substances, the pole-making chains cannot be manifested at all, and if they can't be revealed, there is no way to break it.

It is the biggest shackle that hinders the peak half-step perfect controller from becoming the half-step perfect master of the Extreme Creation Realm.

And now, Ye Tian only needs to break it to break through!
